---
title: "\'Ministering angels: Victorian ladies and nursing\'"
---

## \'Ministering angels: Victorian ladies and nursing\'

**Author:** Anne Summers
**Date:** 1990
**Imprint:** in  Gordon Marsden (ed) <i>Victorian Values: Personalities and Perspectives in Nineteenth-Century Society</i> (London: Longman, 1990), 128-30.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
